world_name: World of Darkness - Vampire: The Masquerade
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: World of Darkness / Vampire: The Masquerade inspired gothic-punk horror atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent under eternal night and a blood moon, surrounded by black seas, gothic city districts, Elysium masquerade locations, haunted cemeteries, sewer warrens, cathedral spires, fog-filled parks at midnight, vampire clan domains, werewolf wilderness, mage cabal sanctums, ruined havens and noir coastal cities.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated gothic vampire masquerade atlas, noir atmosphere, dark parchment, silver ink, deep crimson accents, fog and shadows, domain territories marked visually without readable text, political horror mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding dark seas and small offshore haunted fragments; include black compass rose, ornate gothic border, domain boundary shading, cemetery icons, Elysium symbols and sewer-route traces without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, foggy estuaries, cliff coasts and varied landforms; include gloomy megacities, old forests, moors, mountains, wetlands, snowfields, plague-dark farmlands and haunted coastal harbors.
Avoid: bright heroic fantasy, clean tourist map, simple oval continent, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
